source.page_title: Careers - Align Massage Therapy - Put Yourself in Good Hands

source.body_text_sample:
Careers
Careers in Massage Therapy at Align

Align was founded in 2000 and has organically grown to a group of 8 locations in Ottawa.  After 25 years, we've got the business side down pat, and welcome new RMTs and experienced ones to join us and lose the stress. 




We have everything you require to start, grow and maintain a practice - receptionists, linen service, marketing - social media and radio ads, online booking and charting, tools and training and a competitive split. 

We don't have crappy pay (We love writing big cheques!), rigid scheduling, micromanagers or scary contracts. Most therapists start and stay with us, and move on if they literally move (to another city usually). 




Align is by far the largest employer of massage therapists in the city (1/5), and with good reason. We are a team, a group of friends and would love to meet you!




Currently, we are looking for full or part-time RMTs for Kanata, Rockland, Bank St, Barrhaven, Lindenlea, and Sandy Hill. 




Are you an RMT looking to open a clinic and unsure where to start? We are always looking for keeners to help grow the brand, so please reach out and we can show you how much easier it is working in a team.


Please send a resume, or pop in for a visit! You can reach the head honcho at jana@alignyourbody.com

Find out more
Our Experienced Management Team
Jana Veltheim, RMT

Owner and Founder. Jana owns Orleans, Barrhaven & Parkdale locations, and oversees brand management.

Jenna Sweet, RMT

Owner of A
